entries.name: WithdrawalVerifier
entries.description: Stateless Groth16 verifier used by Privacy Pool contracts to verify withdrawal proofs.

entries.name: PrivacyPoolUSDS
entries.description: ERC20 Privacy Pool that escrows one asset for one scope. Only the Entrypoint can create deposits or wind the pool down. Withdrawals and ragequits depend on the linked Groth16 verifiers and on the latest association-set root in the Entrypoint.

SCOPE.description: Unique scope identifier that the Entrypoint uses to map relayed withdrawals to this pool.

dead.description: If true, the pool has been irreversibly wound down and no longer accepts new deposits.

assetConfigFromEntrypoint.description: Current per-asset configuration read from the Entrypoint: registered pool, minimum deposit amount, vetting fee BPS, and maximum relay fee BPS.

dead.description: If true, the pool has been irreversibly wound down and no longer accepts new deposits.

assetConfigFromEntrypoint.description: Current per-asset configuration read from the Entrypoint: registered pool, minimum deposit amount, vetting fee BPS, and maximum relay fee BPS.

entries.description: ERC20 Privacy Pool that escrows one asset for one scope. Only the Entrypoint can create deposits or wind the pool down. Withdrawals and ragequits depend on the linked Groth16 verifiers and on the latest association-set root in the Entrypoint.

SCOPE.description: Unique scope identifier that the Entrypoint uses to map relayed withdrawals to this pool.

dead.description: If true, the pool has been irreversibly wound down and no longer accepts new deposits.

assetConfigFromEntrypoint.description: Current per-asset configuration read from the Entrypoint: registered pool, minimum deposit amount, vetting fee BPS, and maximum relay fee BPS.

receivedPermissions.description: publish new association-set roots and IPFS CIDs used by withdrawals.

entries.name: PrivacyPoolsEntrypoint
entries.description: UUPS-upgradeable hub for Privacy Pools. It accepts deposits, relays withdrawals, tracks association-set roots published by the ASP, and maps each supported asset and scope to a pool. Trusting this contract means trusting OWNER_ROLE holders to upgrade it, manage pools and fees, and withdraw fees, and trusting ASP_POSTMAN holders to publish the latest association-set root used by withdrawals.

accessControl.description: Current role membership map for the Entrypoint's owner and postman roles.

associationSets.description: History of association-set roots and IPFS CIDs published by ASP_POSTMAN. Withdrawals must validate against the latest root from this list.

registeredPools.description: Current set of pool contracts registered in the Entrypoint, derived from PoolRegistered and PoolRemoved events.

entries.name: PrivacyPoolWOETH
entries.description: ERC20 Privacy Pool that escrows one asset for one scope. Only the Entrypoint can create deposits or wind the pool down. Withdrawals and ragequits depend on the linked Groth16 verifiers and on the latest association-set root in the Entrypoint.

SCOPE.description: Unique scope identifier that the Entrypoint uses to map relayed withdrawals to this pool.

dead.description: If true, the pool has been irreversibly wound down and no longer accepts new deposits.

assetConfigFromEntrypoint.description: Current per-asset configuration read from the Entrypoint: registered pool, minimum deposit amount, vetting fee BPS, and maximum relay fee BPS.

entries.name: RagequitVerifier
entries.description: Stateless Groth16 verifier used by Privacy Pool contracts to verify ragequit proofs.

receivedPermissions.description: authorize UUPS upgrades to the Entrypoint implementation.
grant and revoke OWNER_ROLE and ASP_POSTMAN.
publish new association-set roots and IPFS CIDs used by withdrawals.
register and remove pools, update per-asset minimum deposits and fee caps, and wind down pools.
withdraw fees held in the Entrypoint.
